title: Battle of Korriban (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several '''battles of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban''']] throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] history:

*An '''[[Incursion of Korriban|attempted invasion]]''' of Korriban by the Killiks
*[[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] Invasion
**'''[[Invasion of Korriban]]'''
*[[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]
**'''[[Funeral of Marka Ragnos]]''', which escalated into a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] on Korriban between [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] and [[Ludo Kressh]]
**'''[[First battle of Korriban]]''', between Naga Sadow and Ludo Kressh's [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] forces
**'''[[Second battle of Korriban]]''', between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]
*[[Post–Great Hyperspace War counterinvasion]]
**A '''[[Battle of Korriban (Post–Great Hyperspace War counterinvasion)|battle of Korriban]]''' between Sith forces under [[Shar Dakhan]] and the Galactic Republic
*[[Jedi Civil War]]
**A '''[[skirmish on Korriban]]''' between the crew of the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'' and the Sith
*[[Great Galactic War]]
**The '''[[Battle of Korriban]]''', between the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
**The '''[[Battle over Korriban]]''' between Republic forces and the Sith Empire
**A '''[[Battle of Korriban (3660 BBY)|battle of Korriban]]''' between the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] and [[Imperial Navy (Sith Empire)|Imperial Armada]] in [[3660 BBY]]
*[[Galactic War]]
**The '''[[Korriban Incursion]]''' launched by the Republic to acquire information from the [[Dark Council Chambers]] in [[3637 BBY]]
**An '''[[attack on Korriban]]''' by the [[Eternal Empire]] in [[3636 BBY]]
*[[New Sith Wars]]
**'''[[Battle of Korriban (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Korriban]]''', between [[Skere Kaan|Lord Kaan's]] [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] and the Galactic Republic
*Galactic Republic
**'''[[Mission to Korriban (23 BBY)|Mission to Korriban]]''', between [[Granta Omega]] and a Jedi strike team
*[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
**'''[[Battle of Korriban (Clone Wars)|Battle of Korriban]]''' a battle between the Galactic Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]
*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
**'''[[Battle of Korriban (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Korriban]]''', between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
**[[Disciples of Ragnos]] crisis
***'''[[Battle of Korriban (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|Battle of Korriban]]''', between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Disciples of Ragnos]] with the [[Imperial Remnant]].
*[[Second Imperial Civil War]]
**'''[[Mission to Korriban (Second Imperial Civil War)|Mission to Korriban]]''', in which two [[Imperial Knight]]s and one [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] rescued [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Marasiah Fel]]

|pt=Batalha de Korriban
}}
